message:
fix(seance): clear CLAUDECODE env to unblock --talk from agent sessions

Seance --talk spawns a Claude Code subprocess via exec.Command, which
inherits CLAUDECODE=1 from the parent session. Claude Code nested-session
guard rejects it. Clear CLAUDECODE from the subprocess env, matching the
pattern already used by AgentEnv in config/env.go for sling-spawned sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
